subcodes.first_line: The whole world hath been created to serve the Cause of God, and all the Prophets have summoned the peoples of the earth unto this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای خدمت امر الله خلق شده اند و جمیع انبیا اهل ارض را باین یوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purpose; goal of creation
